framework.name: Payment Account Reference (PAR) Integration
framework.description: TAP enables agents to pass Payment Account References (PARs) - Visa's tokenized card identifiers - directly to merchants in verified signatures. This allows card-on-file retrieval without exposing PAN data, potentially bypassing traditional payment processor authorization flows for pre-authorized agents.
framework.raw_quote: Securely receive key information needed for checkout via query parameters. This can include, as consented by the consumer, verifiable consumer identifiers, Payment Account References (PARs) for cards on file, or other identifiers like loyalty numbers, emails and phone numbers.

source.title: GitHub - visa/trusted-agent-protocol: Establishing a universal standard of trust between AI agents and merchants for the next phase of agentic commerce. · GitHub
